steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: She's unknown by name, yet her work in a famous musical is widely seen. These claims oppose each other.

steps.title: Apply the transition to the choices
steps.content:
However works because it acknowledges both facts—she's obscure by name but famous for her work.

The other three fail: Similarly and Therefore suggest these connect smoothly, while For example treats the second as proof of the first.

That confirms D is correct.
